paragraphs: Home / Blog / Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Hong Konger Businesses?

Harmonics are vital to a power system because they alter the quality of the electricity and how things function. Overheating produced by high harmonic levels may impair the lifespan of the equipment. Harmonics modify the pure sine wave generated by a perfect power source. Harmonic distortion complicates the operation and production of enterprises. The following are some commercial effects of harmonic distortion.

Harmonics are created by loads that draw electricity in brief, sudden bursts rather than constantly. These pulses produce harmonic currents to flow as distorted current waves throughout the power system. Harmonics reduce the dependability and efficiency of industrial electricity. Up to 15% of nonlinear loads may be safely managed by most organizations’ electrical systems. If nonlinear loads account for more than 15% of the overall load, harmonic distortions may be hazardous. Therefore, it is vital to monitor harmonic levels to ensure they do not become excessive. Harmonic research and analysis are important for monitoring potential risks and causes. By doing so, it may be simpler to avoid harmonic-related issues at the design phase and less probable that undesirable outcomes would occur.
Even if harmonic issues are unlikely, they must be analyzed immediately to ensure they are not grave. Here are the harmonic level’s stages:
